title: Create new buckets
excerpt: description: Create R2 buckets using the Cloudflare dashboard or Wrangler CLI. image: https://developers.cloudflare.com/dev-products-preview.png > Fetch the complete documentation index at: https://developers.cloudflare.com/r2/llms.txt > Use this file to discover all available pages before exploring further. You can create a bucket from the Cloudflare dashboard or using Wrangler. Wrangler is [a command-line tool](https://developers.cloudflare.com/workers/wrangler/install-and-update/) for building with Cloudflare's developer products, including R2.
